PenaltyShootoutId.description: The unique ID of the penalty shootout

GameId.description: The unique ID of the game tied to this penalty shootout

Type.description: The result of this penalty shootout kick. Possible values: Goal; Miss.

TeamId.description: The unique ID of the team

PlayerId.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID stays with the player their entire career.

Name.description: The name of the player in the penalty shootout

Position.description: The position of the player. Possible values include: A (Attacker); M (Midfielder); D (Defender); GK (Goalkeeper).

Order.description: The order of the penalty shootout
